title: Heating device with thermometers and thermostats alternately arranged on a heat conductor
abstract: A heating device includes a substrate, one or more heating elements arranged along the substrate, a heat conductor contacting the substrate, a plurality of thermometers each configured to measure a temperature of the heat conductor, and a plurality of thermostats each configured to measure a temperature of the heat conductor and interrupt electrical power supplied to the heating elements. The thermometers and the thermostats are alternately arranged in a longitudinal direction of the substrate.
claims: 1. A heating device, comprising: a substrate; a heating element on the substrate; a heat conductor contacting the substrate; a plurality of thermometers; and a plurality of thermostats, each of the thermostats contacting the heat conductor and configured to interrupt electrical power supplied to the heating element, wherein the thermometers and the thermostats are arranged in a longitudinal direction of the substrate with at least one of the thermometers between adjacent two of the thermostats.
